description_long: This is a single-tier, round chocolate cake with a dusting of powdered sugar on top, placed at the center of a large, circular, white marble-patterned plate. Surrounding the cake are evenly spaced, white, leaf-shaped decorations, likely made of fondant or white chocolate, arranged in a ring around the cake. The cake itself has a slightly domed top and a rich, dark brown color, suggesting a dense, moist texture. The plate is smooth and glossy, with a subtle gray veining typical of marble. There are no candles or additional decorative elements present. The overall presentation is clean and minimalist, with a focus on symmetry and contrast between the dark cake and the white plate and decorations.
description: A single-tier chocolate cake dusted with powdered sugar sits at the center of a large, white marble-patterned plate, surrounded by white leaf-shaped decorations. The presentation is minimalist and symmetrical.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake centered on the marble-patterned plate, with white leaf decorations clearly visible in a ring.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side of the cake and the even spacing of the leaf decorations around the plate.
description_view_2: The cake's domed top and powdered sugar dusting are prominent, with the leaf decorations forming a symmetrical border.
description_view_3: A slightly rotated view showing the cake's side and the consistent arrangement of the white leaf decorations.
